price_targets_post_print.src: web search — sell-side notes post Q2 2026 print

notes: ASML delivered a genuine beat-and-raise: Q2 revenue/margin beat, FY26 guide raised a SECOND time (to €43-45B). The structural change this quarter is that ASML retired quarterly net bookings disclosure starting Q1 2026 (management cited lumpy single-order distortion) -- the thesis's primary forward KPI no longer exists as a hard number. Repurposed KPI_HIST/KPI_PROJ and the core SIGNALS row from bookings to quarterly-revenue-vs-guide as the best available substitute. Price target cluster from sell-side sits meaningfully above current price ($1,815), consistent with the bull case being live, but the base case anchors closer to the target cluster than to a fresh multiple expansion, since the ~50x 2026E multiple already prices in a lot of the good news.
